creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Ulas SAYGIN from comment #0)

> Maybe deleting this port is a right choice because , there is no support and 
> chance of successful install.

The version in the port is 0.9.33.2. With a short look on the release archive[1] it seems, that the version is outdated by a year. So it is possible that an update would fix the issue.

[1] https://files.froxlor.org/releases/
